Removed_Other.name: FFlagWTTDontPerformOcclusionForOutsideOfRange_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Disables occlusion effects for objects that are too far away.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary visual processing for distant objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the combination of individual makeup assets into a single asset.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to use makeup items more flexibly without merging them.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUnifyCaptures
Added_Other.mechanism: Combines different capture methods into a single system.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies how players can capture game events, making it easier to track and respond to actions.

Added_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle
Added_World.mechanism: Utilizes a more efficient method for occlusion culling based on the nearest triangle mapping.
Added_World.purpose: Improves visual performance by ensuring only visible objects are rendered, leading to a smoother experience.
